starterCode:
-- Create a variable called 'message' and set it to "Hello, Roblox!"
-- Then print the message to the console

tests.description: Print the message to the console

hints: Use the 'local' keyword to create a variable: local message = ...
Strings in Lua are wrapped in double quotes: "text here"
Use print(message) to output your variable to the console
successMessage: Excellent! You've created your first Lua variable and printed it. Variables are the building blocks of all programs!
